classes.label: Topic
classes.description: A research topic or subject area associated with papers

data_properties.label: has relation type
data_properties.description: Numeric code indicating the type of relation between a paper and a topic

object_properties.label: paper covers topics
object_properties.description: Relation indicating that a paper addresses or covers a particular research topic

decision_summary.reason: TopicID is a primary key in rel_paper_topic, indicating Topic is a distinct entity type. The table structure suggests a many-to-many relationship between papers and topics.
rel_paper_topic is a junction table with PaperID and TopicID as composite primary key, representing a many-to-many association between Paper and Topic entities.
RelationType is a non-key integer column that qualifies the paper-topic relationship. Modeled as a data property on Paper to capture the relation type code.

remaining_ambiguities: The semantic meaning of RelationType values is unknown; without sample data or documentation, it is unclear whether this represents a categorical classification, strength indicator, or other qualifier.
Topic entity definition is incomplete; no attributes (name, description, URI) are present in rel_paper_topic itself, suggesting Topic may be defined in a separate table not yet processed.

needs_probe.question: What are the distinct values and their semantic meanings for RelationType?
Is there a separate topics table that defines Topic attributes (name, description, etc.)?
